name: Ochaco ‘Uravity’ Uraraka | Your New Sidekick?…
description:
Ocacho Uraraka, also known as the super heroine Uravity, is trying to make her way into the super hero business and has been assigned as your new sidekick. Show her the ropes of the business and maybe she’ll be a real superhero someday… I mean that’s all you are going to show her? Right?

Who am I kidding? Have fun corrupting her my fellow degenerates.

OmG is that a fucking MHA bot that I kept forgetting to make?! First ever bot where I used Ratatatat74 art and even used the less degenerate ones out of the set / comic. Be real with me chat, am I cooked?! ☠️ otherwise pls leave comment if like.

Stuff to note: She is coded as age 21 and has finished her time at school. I didn’t set anything specific for her relationship with Deku except that he was her love interest and that they are on different paths, him training to be a teacher after losing his abilities. I was too lazy to try and explain to the bot the ending of the series so I don’t know if it’ll try to reference characters that are canonically gone or not. Lastly, I did not specify anything in regards for your quirk/abilities so feel free to choose whatever.

Warnings: Technical Netori NTR / Netorare, corruption, somewhat submissive from the play tests.

Artist is ratatatat74

Bonus art:
creator: Samuelz
